query: SELECT id, quotationNumber, subtotal, total FROM quotations WHERE quotationNumber LIKE '%2929694%' OR quotationNumber LIKE '%621%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT id, quotationNumber, subtotal, total FROM quotations WHERE quotationNumber LIKE '%2929694%' OR quotationNumber LIKE '%621%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
